goal: Add a stable local terrain deformation foundation where projectile terrain impacts create deterministic craters, rebuild the visible terrain and collision, and expose the event list for future multiplayer sync.

current_terrain: TerrainWorld generates deterministic height from seed/settings.
PreviewCollision is rebuilt from the generated mesh.
Tank aiming and projectile terrain hits use TerrainWorld height sampling instead of expensive Terrain3D runtime raycasts.

must_have: TerrainWorld stores crater events as primitive dictionaries.
TerrainWorld height calculation includes crater deformation.
apply_crater(global_position, radius, depth) updates the event list and rebuilds mesh/collision.
Projectile terrain impact calls apply_crater on the terrain probe.
Runtime smoke test verifies terrain height changes after a crater.
No Terrain3D runtime node or synchronous Terrain3D collision build is reintroduced.
explicit_non_goals: No persistent save/load of crater event history.
No partial mesh chunk rebuild optimization.
No visual particles, decals, scorch marks, or sound polish.
No overhangs, caves, voxel terrain, or Terrain3D runtime editing.

determinism: Crater events must contain only primitive values: x, z, radius, depth.
Given the same seed/settings and event list, every peer can reconstruct the same terrain height.
Later multiplayer should sync only crater events, not mesh buffers.
performance: v0.2.1 may rebuild the full preview mesh after each crater because terrain is small.
Do not use per-frame mesh physics raycasts against terrain.
Do not rebuild Terrain3D collision in the normal runtime path.
node_first: Keep visual/collision nodes in the scene.
Expose gameplay tuning through exported inspector values.
Use code only for terrain math, event storage, and projectile impact behavior.

slices.goal: Save the scoped terrain deformation plan.
Document the local crater workflow, future network contract, and manual test gate.
notes: Runbook now documents v0.2.1 as local-only crater deformation.
Manual gate covers starting a match, shooting terrain, visible crater confirmation, and responsiveness checks.
Future multiplayer handoff is seed/settings plus ordered primitive crater events; network sync remains deferred.

slices.goal: Implement local crater events and projectile-triggered deformation.
Review and extend validation around height delta, event fingerprint, and no freeze regressions.
Run focused Godot checks, runtime smoke, live editor sanity test, stage only scope, commit, and push.

runtime_smoke: Apply a crater at a sampled terrain point.
Assert terrain height at the crater center decreases.
Fire once and verify ammo/reload still work.
manual_gate: Verify game stays responsive and terrain visibly changes.

stop_rules: Stop if Terrain3D runtime collision is required to make the feature work.
Stop if crater rebuild causes editor freeze or smoke timeout.
Stop on secrets, destructive Git commands, or unclear branch/remote state.

go_language.go: Local crater deformation works from projectile terrain hits, smoke tests pass, editor remains responsive, and the event list/fingerprint are ready for later sync.
go_language.partial: Manual apply_crater works but projectile integration or live editor gate needs another slice.
go_language.no_go: Terrain deformation causes freezes, breaks tank driving/aiming, or requires Terrain3D runtime collision.
go_language.deferred: Network sync, persistence, chunk optimization, and visual polish.
